attributes.action: Accelerate onboard CCTV installation on London Underground trains
attributes.additional_details: While CCTV is widely used in stations, not all London Underground trains have onboard coverage. This creates gaps in safety, particularly on busy lines. Incidents such as harassment and antisocial behaviour are harder to investigate without onboard footage. Expanding CCTV coverage would deter crime, support investigations and improve safety for passengers and staff.
attributes.background: Work with Transport for London to fund and accelerate installation of onboard CCTV across all Underground trains, prioritising high-traffic lines such as the Central Line, to improve passenger safety and support enforcement.

rejection.details:
We can't accept your petition because the issue you raise is not the responsibility of the Government or Parliament. Transport in London is the responsibility of the London Assembly.

The London Assembly has its own petitions process. You can find out more about how to petition the London Assembly here:

https://www.london.gov.uk/about-us/london-assembly/petitions

You can also contact your local London Assembly Members about this issue. You can find out who they are and how to contact them here: https://www.london.gov.uk/who-we-are/what-london-assembly-does/london-assembly-members
